name: Put the Supervisor chat scrollbar on .chat-output-box

rounds.prompt: Fix the web toolbar Supervisor tab so its vertical scrollbar is owned by the `.chat-output-box` element. Remove scrolling ownership from the incorrect enclosing element while preserving the existing toolbar layout, transcript rendering, input controls, and auto-scroll behavior. Add behavioral browser coverage that fills the Supervisor transcript enough to overflow and proves `.chat-output-box` is the element whose scroll position changes, while the enclosing Supervisor tab container does not own the vertical scrollbar. Run the focused web/browser tests for this behavior and report the exact evidence.

rounds.implementation_report:
Implemented Goal `00000SZ2PGMQR29F16GSKJ4000` and left three scoped files modified for review.

Changed:

- [toolbar.css](/home/buddy/projects/refine-next/.git/refine-worktrees/refine-00000SZ2PGMQR29F16GSKJ4000-round-2/src/surfaces/web/static/css/toolbar.css:106): Supervisor toolbar body no longer owns vertical scrolling; `.chat-output-box` does.
- [toolbar.js](/home/buddy/projects/refine-next/.git/refine-worktrees/refine-00000SZ2PGMQR29F16GSKJ4000-round-2/src/surfaces/web/static/js/features/toolbar.js:721): added Supervisor-specific layout class and routed initial/live transcript auto-scroll to `.chat-output-box`.
- [web_supervisor_toolbar.test.js](/home/buddy/projects/refine-next/.git/refine-worktrees/refine-00000SZ2PGMQR29F16GSKJ4000-round-2/tests/web_supervisor_toolbar.test.js:252): added an 80-line overflow regression proving the box scrolls while the transcript element and enclosing toolbar body do not.

Verification:

- `node --test tests/web_supervisor_toolbar.test.js` — **12 passed, 0 failed**
- `cargo run --manifest-path xtask/Cargo.toml -- test-browser` — **32 passed, 0 failed**
- `git diff --check` — **passed**
- Worktree contains only the three intended modified files.
